items.title: VI Live: Manchester United ontvangt Tottenham, Arsenal tegen Sunderland
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er vier Eredivisie-wedstrijden op het programma, maar ook in het buitenland wordt gevoetbald. Onder meer Manchester Unitedm Arsenal, Barcelona, Borussia Dortmund en Napoli komen in actie. Volg al het voetbal in de VI Live.

items.title: De ongelooflijke reis van de Rotterdammer die plots bij Benfica schittert
items.summary: Sidny Lopes Cabral (23) werd onlangs naast Rui Costa gepresenteerd als nieuwe aanwinst van Benfica. Niet veel later liet hij onder toeziend oog van José Mourinho het Estádio da Luz ontploffen. Heel lang klonken dergelijke hoogtepunten slechts als een utopie voor de vleugelspeler. Drie jaar geleden speelde hij namelijk op het vijfde niveau van Duitsland en ruim een half jaar terug nog in de 3. Liga. Nu wachten de Champions League én het WK. ‘Mijn carrière is een crazy verhaal.’

items.title: Gory to glory? Why England can bounce back from awful Ashes at World Cup
items.summary: What better way for England to rebound from a winter of discontent than by winning a global white-ball title?

items.title: Lulamba tackles open company for first time on Super Saturday at Newbury
items.summary: Lulamba will aim to underline his Cheltenham Festival credentials when he faces open company for the first time in the Game Spirit Chase at Newbury on Super Saturday, live on Sky Sports Racing.

items.title: Some 'dark days and nights' at Arsenal, happiness at Sunderland
items.summary: Granit Xhaka sits down with Kelly Somers to talk about his motivation for joining Sunderland, and falling out with the Arsenal fans.

items.title: Steijn vergelijkt seizoen met eerder topjaar: 'In alle opzichten goed bezig zijn'
items.summary: Maurice Steijn beaamt dat Sparta Rotterdam bezig is aan een uitstekend seizoen. De Rotterdammers bezetten momenteel de vijfde plek in de Eredivisie en mogen dromen van Europees voetbal. Steijn moet weleens terugdenken aan zijn vorige topseizoen met Sparta.

items.title: Trainen met een microfoontje en debuut in Friesland: de eerste week van Ronaldo bij PSV
items.summary: In de rubriek VI-Tijdmachine brengen we met regelmaat nieuwe verhalen over toen, en elke dag van het weekeinde herplaatsen we een artikelen uit ons rijke archief. Deze keer gaan we terug naar 1994, toen het wonderkind Ronaldo net was neergestreken bij PSV.

items.title: USMNT to compete for 1 of 6 spots at 2030 WC
items.summary: Concacaf says it will have six automatic qualifying spots in the 2030 World Cup and a seventh will be available as part of an intercontinental playoff.

items.title: Arteta apologises to Rosenior after 'disrespect'
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has apologised to Chelsea after Liam Rosenior accused the north London side of a "lack of respect" during the warm-ups before Tuesday's Carabao Cup semifinal, second leg.

items.title: Colombia star Rodríguez joins Loons through WC
items.summary: Minnesota United on Friday officially signed Colombia international star forward James Rodríguez through this summer's World Cup.

items.title: Chelsea boss Rosenior shrugs off online mockery
items.summary: Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior shrugged off the mockery he receives online and admitted even members of his own squad are in on the joke.

items.title: A result that puts Leeds safe, Forest in trouble - and Dyche in doubt?
items.summary: After Leeds' win over Nottingham Forest on Friday, BBC Sport looks at what it all means for the Premier League relegation battle.

items.title: Carrick: Man Utd cannot make 'knee-jerk' decision on next coach
items.summary: Michael Carrick says Manchester United cannot make a "knee-jerk" decision about their long-term future on the back of him winning his first three matches as head coach.

items.title: 'Sergio Ramos biedt zich aan bij Marseille'
items.summary: In de buitenlandse topcompetities is Deadline Day voorbij, maar in enkele landen kunnen nog deals gesloten worden. Traditiegetrouw volgt Voetbal International de buitenlandse markt op de voet. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in Nederland.

items.title: ‘You have to be able to laugh at yourself’: Rosenior shrugs off online mockery
items.summary: Chelsea head coach has been a target for ridicule Rosenior hails positive change in culture at Chelsea Liam Rosenior says life is too short to worry about people laughing at him. The 41-year-old has quickly become a figure of fun since his appointment as Chelsea’s head coach and was ridiculed after miscontrolling a dropping ball during his side’s defeat at Arsenal on Tuesday. It was the latest example of Rosenior facing online mockery because of his quotes and mannerisms. He has been referred to as “LinkedIn Liam” because of some of his comments in press conferences and compared to David Brent. One meme had him mocked up as Will McKenzie, the nerdy lead character from The Inbetweeners. Continue reading...

items.title: Slot hopes to press on with Liverpool’s recovery as Manchester City provide litmus test
items.summary: Head coach says champions were ‘outplayed for large parts’ in 3-0 reverse last November, but are now more dangerous The test for Liverpool against Manchester City on Sunday is not of their title credentials. That ship has sailed. Instead it is of how far Arne Slot’s side have truly progressed since their title defence was holed. Slot feels Liverpool’s displays have warranted defeat only occasionally this season – late lapses, set-piece failures and wasted chances have been more common explanations than the overall performance – and the 3-0 reverse at the Etihad Stadium in November was certainly one of them. The controversy over Virgil van Dijk’s disallowed header at 1-0 still lingers for the Dutchman but does not prevent him holding his hands up. Continue reading...

items.title: 'I feel at home here' - Carrick hints he wants Man Utd stay
items.summary: Michael Carrick drops the first hint he wants to remain as Manchester United head coach beyond the end of this season

items.title: Calvert-Lewin caps fine win for Leeds to leave Nottingham Forest reeling
items.summary: The job is not done yet, far from it. But on a rainswept evening in West Yorkshire, the collective response from everyone associated with Leeds United for each of their goals left you in no doubt that this had the whiff of a season-defining night. With Leeds and Nottingham Forest sitting an advantageous but not decisive six points above the relegation zone before kick-off, and 18th-placed West Ham away at Burnley on Saturday, it felt like both these famous old clubs knew victory could dramatically shape the remaining three months of the campaign. Continue reading...

items.title: Saudi to offload Ronaldo for £43m - Saturday's gossip
items.summary: Saudi Pro League is ready to offload Cristiano Ronaldo for £43m, Chelsea set to rival Tottenham for Dusan Vlahovic, while Sergio Ramos offers his services to Marseille, plus more.
